news.title: Hyperliquid treasuries stand alone in profit as legacy crypto DATs bleed billions
news.summary: Strategy, Bitmine, and other major treasury firms have seen paper gains evaporate as crypto prices continue sliding.

news.title: Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say
news.summary: Fallout from a bug that enabled undetectable Zcash counterfeiting shows that privacy can sometimes present tradeoffs, experts say.

news.title: Strategy Shares Fall to 4-Month Low as STRC Dips and Bitcoin Sinks Under $60K
news.summary: Strategy shares tumbled alongside Bitcoin on Friday as the firm's flagship preferred stock also came under pressure.

news.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
news.summary: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

news.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
news.summary: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

news.title: ETH 1550

Feb 3rd 2021 - Eth, $1,550
Jun 12th 2022 - Eth $1,550
Jan 15th 2023 - Eth $1,550
Sep 12th 2023 - ETH $1,550
April 7th 2025 - ETH $1,550
June 5th 2026 - ETH $1,550

Congrats to all ETH holders.
